[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011111 5
1 0100101 3
2 1011110 5
3 0010010 2
4 1101111 6
5 0000001 1
6 1111010 5
7 1011000 3

01 10 0111111 6
12 21 1110111 6
23 32 1111000 4
34 43 1011000 3 match 7
45 54 1011101 5
56 65 1010111 5
67 76 0001110 3
70 07 0111010 4

02 20 1111010 5 match 6
13 31 1011111 6
24 42 1111000 4
35 53 1011101 5
46 64 0011110 4
57 75 1011111 6
60 06 0111110 5
71 17 0001111 4

03 30 1111010 5 match 6
14 41 0011111 5 match 0
25 52 1110101 5
36 63 1011110 5 match 2
47 74 0011010 3
50 05 1111111 a
61 16 0000111 3
72 27 1111010 5 match 6

04 40 0111010 4
15 51 1010111 5
26 62 1110110 5
37 73 1011010 4
